heading: Vector Index Definition
body:
An [index](manual/indexes) is a data structure
that holds a subset of data from a collection's documents that improves database
performance for specific queries. A [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) points to the fields that contain text that you want to
configure Automated Embedding using a supported Voyage AI embedding model for.

The `autoEmbed` type index configures Automated Embedding for the
`fullplot` field using the `voyage-4` embedding model in the
index definition.
